privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for webots_env configure_demo_presentation task by confirming that the initial environment state (empty title, default FOV, gray background) is synthetically injected into the standard e-puck.wbt world via setup scripts. Explicitly verified the expected world title ('Robot Navigation Demo - TechExpo 2024'), Z-position (3.0), field of view (1.2), and skyColor ([0.05, 0.05, 0.2]) parameters against the task description instructions and verifier.py logic.
